disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.line1: This service is not affiliated with any artists, labels, or brands.
disclaimer.line2: All results are AI-generated style images; exact likeness is not guaranteed.
disclaimer.line3: Style results may vary due to the nature of AI generation.

hero.title: Turn Your Photo into a K-Pop Style Shot
hero.description: Pick your hair, outfit, and backdrop. AI transforms your selfie in under a minute.

how.title: How the magic happens
how.description: Three steps for users, with real payment/session safeguards under the hood.

step1.title: Pick Your Style
step1.body: Start paid checkout, return with `checkout_id`, and wait for session handshake.

step2.title: Upload Selfie & Choose Hair
step2.body: Upload one selfie, pick two hairstyles, run async generation, then choose one.

step3.title: AI Generation
step3.body: Continue through outfit/background stages and download your final selected result.

step4.title: Review & Download
step4.body: Check your AI-generated results and download the final image.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.note: Auto-refunded only on confirmed technical generation failure.

shell.uploadPrompt: Upload a selfie to see a live preview.

consent.age: I am 13 years of age or older.
consent.ownership: I own the rights to this photo and consent to AI processing.

notice.missing: Complete the missing keys above before running full checkout-to-hair E2E.
notice.ready: Checkout, session, and hair prerequisites are ready.

checkoutActions.description: Checkout creates a paid session and returns through `checkout_id` polling. Demo flow is development-only unless explicitly enabled.

errors.create: Unable to create a checkout session.

page.title: Create session
page.descriptionDemo: Start checkout for the real paid flow. Development-only demo path is still available.
page.descriptionProd: Start checkout for the real paid flow. Production requires a verified paid session.

uploadPage.title: Upload your selfie
uploadPage.descriptionDemo: When checkout_id exists this page polls real session status. Development demo is allowed without checkout_id.
uploadPage.descriptionProd: This page polls real session status and unlocks only after paid session confirmation.

photoUpload.title: Upload your selfie
photoUpload.description: Use a clear front-facing image with good lighting for stable generation quality.

notice.demoEnabled: No checkout_id found. Demo flow is available in this environment.
notice.restored: Payment confirmed. Existing session restored from this browser.
notice.polling: Waiting for payment confirmation. This page polls the real session handshake.
notice.ready: Payment confirmed. Your session is ready.
notice.noCheckoutDemo: No `checkout_id` found. Development demo path is enabled.
notice.noCheckoutProd: No `checkout_id` found. Start checkout on Step 1 first.

errors.checkPaidSession: Unable to check the paid session yet.
errors.currentPaidSession: Unable to check the current paid session.
errors.checkoutRequired: A paid checkout session is required. Start from Step 1 first.
errors.stillPending: The paid session is still pending. Wait for the webhook to finish first.

resultGrid.empty: Results will appear here after generation.

hair.shellDescription: Pick two hair concepts, run async generation, then choose one winning result.
hair.shellMissingDescription: Upload is required before hair generation can start.
hair.missingUploadDescription: Add a selfie first so the hair step has something to work from.
hair.selectorDescription: Pick exactly 2 options. Results are generated through the live job pipeline.
hair.processingDescription: Running real async prediction polling through `GET /api/jobs/status?step=hair`.
hair.resultDescription: Download either preview, then mark one as the winner for the next stage.
hair.resultEmpty: Select two hairstyles and click generate to create previews.

notice.polling: Hair generation started. Polling prediction results...
notice.completed: Hair generation completed. Pick one result to continue.

errors.pollStatus: Unable to poll hair generation status.
errors.noResults: Hair generation completed but returned no results.
errors.timeout: Timed out while waiting for hair generation results.
errors.paidSessionRequired: Real hair generation requires a paid session. Complete checkout first and return with checkout_id.
errors.generate: Unable to generate hair previews right now.
errors.verifiedSessionRequired: A verified session is required to continue. Return to upload and complete checkout.
errors.persist: Unable to persist the selected hair result.
errors.readImage: Unable to read the uploaded image for generation.
errors.serializeImage: Unable to serialize the uploaded image.

outfit.shellDescription: Outfit provider is still pending for commercial use, so this stage runs in mock mode.
outfit.missingHairDescription: This stage requires a selected hair result from the previous step.
outfit.missingHairBody: Finish the hair selection first so the outfit step has a selected base.
outfit.mockDescription: Outfit generation is currently simulated for UX validation. Do not treat these results as production output.
outfit.selectorDescription: MVP mock stage: choose 2 outfits, generate 2 previews, then keep one.
outfit.processingDescription: This simulates the async generation stage while the commercial provider decision is still pending.
outfit.cutoutDescription: Simulating the background removal step before moving into the composite stage.
outfit.resultDescription: Download either preview, then choose the one that moves to the cutout step.
outfit.resultEmpty: Select two outfits and click generate to create previews.

donePage.title: You look amazing
donePage.description: Download your final image or clear local data to start a new session.

finalResult.title: Final result
finalResult.description: Review your selected result, download it, then clear local data before starting another run.
finalResult.empty: No final preview is available yet. Complete the flow before visiting this page.
finalResult.sharePayloadText: I just completed my K-style transformation.
finalResult.sharingUnavailable: Sharing is not available in this browser.
finalResult.shareCancelled: Share action was cancelled or blocked.
finalResult.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard is unavailable in this browser.

upload.heading: Step 1: Upload Your Photo
upload.sub: Upload a clear selfie to start your idol-style transformation.
upload.zoneSub: Tap to browse or drag and drop your photo

outfit.noHair: Please select a hair style first.
outfit.avatarSub: Now select an outfit to complete your debut look

terms.title: Terms
terms.description: Add the production legal copy here. Keep the no-affiliation and no exact likeness terms explicit.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Document temporary image processing, token storage, and delete behavior.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.description: Keep the automatic refund rules aligned with the real backend flow.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.description: Document the minimal session and analytics policy here.
